notes: All prices in EUR, excluding VAT.
Every price is a [min, max] range — never show a single number.
Two price categories: one-time (project delivery) and monthly (ongoing services).
One-time formula: (base + sum(features) + sum(integrations)) * designMultiplier * timelineMultiplier + sum(services)
Services are flat add-ons NOT affected by design/timeline multipliers.
Monthly costs shown separately from one-time estimate.
The frontend runs this formula client-side for instant updates.
The backend holds an identical copy for server-side validation on submission.
Prices calibrated for competitive premium Croatian/EU studio positioning (Feb 2026).

baseIncludes: Basic SEO (meta tags, semantic HTML, sitemap, robots.txt)

projectType.headline: What are we building?
projectType.subtitle: Every project starts with a clear goal.

options.label: Website
options.description: A website that works as hard as you do.

options.label: Webshop
options.description: Sell online. No templates. No limits.

options.label: Web Application
options.description: Custom software built for your workflow.

options.label: Something Else
options.description: Tell us what you have in mind.

scope.headline: How big are we thinking?
scope.subtitle: Pick the scope that fits. We'll refine it together.

website.label: Corporate Website
website.description: Multiple audiences. Multiple sections. One cohesive experience.

webshop.label: Starter Store
webshop.description: Start selling with a solid foundation.
webshop.includes: Product catalog, cart, checkout with one payment gateway, basic order management.

webshop.label: Growing Store
webshop.includes: Everything in Starter plus advanced filtering, search, inventory management, discount codes.

webshop.label: Enterprise Store
webshop.includes: Everything in Growing plus multi-warehouse, bulk operations, advanced analytics, API integrations.

webapp.label: Complex Application
webapp.description: Multiple user roles. Real business logic.

features.headline: What should it do?
features.subtitle: Select what you need. Skip what you don't.
features.note: Every project includes responsive design, basic SEO, contact form, GA4, SSL, and one language.

options.label: Multi-Language Support
options.description: Reach more markets. We handle routing, SEO, and content structure for each language.

options.label: Blog / News Section
options.description: Content hub with categories, search, and SEO-optimized posts.

options.label: User Authentication & Member Area
options.description: Login, registration, roles, protected content, user profiles.

options.label: Social Login
options.description: Sign in with Google, Facebook, Apple. One click, no forms.

options.label: Booking & Scheduling
options.description: Calendar, availability, automated confirmations and reminders.

options.label: Custom Admin Dashboard
options.description: Manage content, users, and data through a tailored back-office.

options.label: Site-Wide Search
options.description: Fast, fuzzy search across all content. Filters, instant results.

options.label: Notification System
options.description: Email, push, or SMS notifications. Triggered by events you define.

options.label: File Upload & Management
options.description: Users upload, organize, and download files. Documents, images, media.

options.label: Comments & Reviews
options.description: User-generated feedback. Moderation tools included.

options.label: Dark Mode
options.description: Full dual-theme system with toggle and system preference detection.

options.label: Advanced Animations & 3D
options.description: Custom scroll effects, WebGL, micro-interactions, page transitions.

options.label: AI-Powered Features
options.description: Chatbot, intelligent search, recommendations, content generation.

options.label: Accessibility Audit & Compliance
options.description: WCAG 2.2 AA. Screen reader testing. Keyboard navigation. Proper contrast.

sections.label: E-Commerce Features
sections.note: Base webshop includes product catalog, cart, checkout, and basic order management.

options.label: Product Variants
options.description: Sizes, colors, materials — each with its own stock and price.

options.label: Advanced Inventory Management
options.description: Low stock alerts, reorder points, supplier management, stock history.

options.label: Shipping Integration
options.description: Real-time rates from DHL, GLS, DPD, or local carriers. Label printing.

options.label: Multi-Currency
options.description: Prices in EUR, HRK, USD, GBP — automatic conversion or fixed rates.

options.label: Subscription & Recurring Billing
options.description: Recurring products, membership boxes, SaaS billing. Automated renewal.

options.label: Wishlist & Favorites
options.description: Save products for later. Share wishlists. Back-in-stock alerts.

options.label: Product Reviews & Ratings
options.description: Star ratings, written reviews, verified buyer badges, moderation.

options.label: Discount Codes & Promotions
options.description: Percentage off, fixed amount, free shipping, BOGO, tiered discounts.

options.label: Abandoned Cart Recovery
options.description: Automatic emails when someone leaves items in their cart.

options.label: Customer Order Tracking
options.description: Real-time order status. Tracking numbers. Delivery updates.

options.label: Automated Invoicing
options.description: PDF invoices generated on purchase. Tax-compliant formatting.

options.label: Product Comparison
options.description: Side-by-side feature comparison table. Helps buyers decide.

options.label: Quick View & Quick Buy
options.description: Preview product details and add to cart without leaving the listing.

options.label: Stripe Integration
options.description: Cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, SEPA. The global standard.
options.note: Included free with webshop base. This is for non-webshop projects.

options.label: PayPal Integration
options.description: PayPal checkout, Pay Later, Venmo (US). Huge buyer trust.

options.label: Local Payment Provider
options.description: Monri, CorvusPay, or other regional payment gateway.

options.label: Crypto Payments
options.description: Accept Bitcoin, Ethereum, and stablecoins via Coinbase Commerce or similar.

options.label: CRM Integration
options.description: HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, or custom. Sync contacts and leads.

options.label: Email Marketing Integration
options.description: Mailchimp, ConvertKit, Brevo, or ActiveCampaign. Sync subscribers.

options.label: Marketing Automation
options.description: Automated email flows, lead scoring, behavioral triggers.

options.label: Live Chat Widget
options.description: Intercom, Crisp, Tawk.to, or custom. Real-time visitor support.

options.label: ERP / Accounting Integration
options.description: Connect to your accounting software. SAP, Xero, QuickBooks, or local solutions.

options.label: Maps & Location Services
options.description: Google Maps, Mapbox, or OpenStreetMap. Store locators, directions, geofencing.

options.label: Calendar Integration
options.description: Google Calendar, Outlook, Apple Calendar. Two-way sync.

options.label: Social Media Feed
options.description: Display your Instagram, Facebook, or TikTok feed directly on the site.

options.label: Custom API Integration
options.description: Connect to any third-party service with an API. Webhooks, data sync, automation.

design.headline: How should it look?
design.subtitle: Every project gets a custom design. The question is how deep we go.

options.label: Reference-Based Design
options.description: You have examples you like. We design with clear direction.
options.detail: Fastest path to a design you'll love. You provide inspiration — we make it yours.

options.label: Custom Design From Scratch
options.description: Original concept. Multiple rounds of exploration and refinement.
options.detail: Mood boards, wireframes, unique visual direction. For projects that need to stand apart.

options.label: Brand Identity + Custom Design
options.description: We build your brand from zero, then design the site around it.
options.detail: Logo concepts, color palette, typography, brand guidelines — the full creative package.

addOns.label: Custom Illustrations
addOns.description: Hand-crafted graphics that match your brand. No stock imagery.

addOns.label: Custom Icon Set
addOns.description: Branded icons designed to match your visual language.

addOns.label: Motion Design & Micro-Interactions
addOns.description: Loading animations, hover effects, transition choreography. The details that make it feel alive.

addOns.label: Interactive Prototype
addOns.description: Clickable Figma prototype before development starts. Test flows, get feedback.

services.headline: Need anything else?
services.subtitle: These are added flat — not affected by design or timeline choices.
services.note: One-time services are added to your project total. Monthly services are shown separately.

sections.label: SEO
sections.note: Basic SEO is included in every project (meta tags, semantic HTML, sitemap, robots.txt).

options.label: Technical SEO Audit & Optimization
options.description: Site speed, crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals, structured data.

options.label: On-Page SEO
options.description: Keyword research, meta optimization, heading structure, internal linking strategy.

options.label: Local SEO Setup
options.description: Google Business Profile, local citations, map pack optimization.

options.label: SEO Content Strategy
options.description: Keyword mapping, content calendar, topic clusters, competitor gap analysis.

options.label: Advanced Schema Markup
options.description: Rich snippets, FAQ schema, product schema, breadcrumbs, organization data.

options.label: Monthly SEO Reporting
options.description: Rankings, traffic, conversions, recommendations. Delivered monthly.

options.label: Professional Copywriting
options.description: We write your page content. Clear, on-brand, conversion-focused.

options.label: SEO Copywriting
options.description: Keyword-optimized content that ranks AND reads well.

options.label: Content Translation
options.description: Professional translation, not machine output. Adapted for local market.

options.label: Product Descriptions
options.description: Compelling product copy that sells. SEO-optimized.

options.label: Photography Session
options.description: Product, team, or location photography. Professional quality.

options.label: Video Production
options.description: Promo video, product demo, or brand film. Script, shoot, edit.

sections.label: Analytics & Tracking
sections.note: Google Analytics 4 basic setup is included in every project.

options.label: Advanced Analytics Setup
options.description: Custom events, goals, funnels, e-commerce tracking, cross-domain.

options.label: Heatmaps & Session Recording
options.description: Hotjar or similar. See exactly how visitors use your site.

options.label: Conversion Tracking
options.description: Google Ads, Facebook Pixel, LinkedIn Insight Tag. Track what matters.

options.label: Custom Analytics Dashboard
options.description: Your own real-time dashboard. No more digging through GA4.

options.label: A/B Testing Setup
options.description: Test headlines, layouts, CTAs. Data-driven design decisions.

options.label: Domain Registration
options.description: We register and configure your domain. .com, .hr, .eu, or any TLD.

options.label: Shared Hosting
options.description: Reliable hosting for standard websites. Fast, secure, maintained.

options.label: VPS / Cloud Hosting
options.description: Dedicated resources. For high-traffic sites, web apps, and e-commerce.

options.label: Business Email Setup
options.description: Professional email at your domain. Google Workspace, Zoho, or Titan.

options.label: CDN Setup
options.description: Cloudflare or similar. Faster load times worldwide. DDoS protection included.

options.label: Staging Environment
options.description: Test changes before they go live. Separate copy of your site.

options.label: Automated Backups
options.description: Daily backups with one-click restore. Never lose data.

options.label: Premium SSL Certificate
options.description: Extended Validation (EV) or Organization Validated (OV). Green bar trust.
options.note: Basic SSL (Let's Encrypt) is included free. This is for enhanced trust signals.

sections.label: Support & Maintenance
sections.note: Every project includes 30 days of post-launch support. These plans kick in after.

options.label: No Ongoing Maintenance
options.description: One-time delivery. You handle updates yourself after the 30-day support window.

options.label: Basic Maintenance
options.description: Security updates, uptime monitoring, monthly health check. 2 hours support.

options.label: Standard Maintenance
options.description: Everything in Basic plus content updates, bug fixes, performance monitoring. 5 hours support.

options.label: Premium Maintenance
options.description: Priority support, monthly review calls, proactive optimization, new features. 10 hours support.

options.label: CMS Training Session
options.description: 1-2 hour video call. We walk you through managing your site.

options.label: Documentation Package
options.description: Written guide with screenshots. How to update content, manage products, read analytics.

options.label: Video Tutorial Series
options.description: Recorded screencasts for your team. Watch anytime, share with new hires.

options.label: Support Hours Package
options.description: 10 hours of on-demand support. Use for questions, tweaks, or guidance.

timeline.headline: When do you need it?
timeline.subtitle: Good work takes time. But we move fast when you need us to.

options.label: Flexible
options.description: No rush. We fit it around our schedule.
options.detail: Best value. We deliver on a comfortable timeline — typically our standard speed or slightly longer.

options.label: Standard
options.description: Our normal timeline. Fast by industry standards.
options.detail: Most projects: 4–10 weeks depending on scope. We don't drag things out.

options.label: Priority
options.description: Front of the queue. Dedicated resources.
options.detail: Accelerated delivery. Your project gets priority scheduling and a faster feedback loop.

summary.headline: Here's your estimate.
summary.subtitle: A starting point, not a final quote. The real number comes after we talk.
summary.disclaimer: Estimates are based on typical project complexity. Final pricing depends on specific requirements, content volume, and integration depth. All prices exclude VAT.
summary.rangeExplanation: We show a range because no two projects are the same. The lower end assumes straightforward requirements. The upper end accounts for complexity we'll discover together.

formula.oneTime: (basePrice + sum(featurePrices) + sum(integrationPrices) + sum(designAddOnPrices)) * designMultiplier * timelineMultiplier + sum(servicePrices_oneTime)

calculation.rounding: round to nearest 100 for one-time, nearest 10 for monthly/yearly
notes: Feature/integration prices with hasQuantity are multiplied by the selected quantity.
Design and timeline multipliers apply to: base + features + integrations + design add-ons.
Service prices (SEO, content, hosting, maintenance, training, analytics) are added flat — NOT multiplied.
Monthly and yearly costs are shown separately from the one-time project cost.
If the calculated one-time minimum falls below €2,500, clamp it to €2,500.
Features with 'freeWhen' conditions cost €0 when the condition is met.
Features with 'requiresFeature' are only selectable when the dependency is active.
Maintenance plan is mutually exclusive — only one can be selected.

estimatedTimelines._note: Approximate delivery weeks by scope tier. Shown on summary step for context.
